XMPP connection using Hedwig on Elixir and Phoenix

September 18, 2015

Yesterday I’ve had a great opportunity to talk with a tiny alchemists group about establishing XMPP connection from a Phoenix server. The meetup took a form of an interactive tutorial. You can check out the whole walktrough on my github profile or on soErlang webpage: - github/wende/mognoosetutorial - SoErlang

Cheers! Chris
